name: ITEMS_LookupItemRecordByCode
abi_note: __stdcall(uint* pItemCode, int* pIndex) -- RET 0x8. Delegates to BinarySearchInSortedArray (Fog thunk @0x6fd59240, __stdcall 3 stack args); reimpl calls it via D2MOO_Resolve (delegate rung). Out-param *pIndex compared via buf readback.
vector_note: pItemCode buf initial value = 4-byte item code as LE u32. First attempt used SPACE-padded 3-char codes ('gld ') and got 0/10 found -- D2's 3-char item codes are NULL-padded, not space-padded, so none matched the sorted table (10/10 'not found' -- proved the guard+delegate path but NOT the found/stride-math branch). Recomputed NULL-padded ('gld\0') below to also exercise the found branch. Not-found path is GRACEFUL (ret NULL, *pIndex=0, no abort) so full-range vectors are safe. pIndex init = 12345 junk to prove the function overwrites it on every path.
